evidence.rationale: close route aggregates sales_log rows where payment_method ~ /^cash$/i; the test re-runs the same query and asserts equality.
close route unwinds invoices.payments and sums payments.date==today for credit/partial invoices.

evidence.note: B-3 patched — partial-sale line totals are now excluded from cash_sales_pipeline; partial cash portion enters total_cash_ar via ar_pipeline only.

evidence.rationale: ar_pipeline unwinds invoice.payments and matches by payments.date == today, independent of order_date.
new_credit aggregates invoices.balance filtered on order_date==today; yesterday's invoice has order_date=yesterday.

evidence.note: Route persists `over_short` on close_record unconditionally; ledger variance entry is optional depending on _write_close_ledger_entries.
